project_type: Node.js Express + Socket.IO real-time CRM application
test_framework: No test framework - no tests exist in the project
test_command: node -e "require('./server.js')" is not safe (starts server). Use syntax validation: node --check server.js
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to ensure deps are present. 2. Run node --check server.js to verify syntax. 3. Start server briefly with timeout to confirm no startup crash.
environment_constraints: No test framework exists. Verification is via syntax check and manual inspection of logic. Server uses port 3000.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Follow existing code patterns in server.js.
key_patterns: Single-file architecture (server.js, 2427 lines). State is in-memory appState object persisted to state.json via saveState(). Agent IDs follow pattern 'emp_<eid>'. Numbers track references to agents via: assignedTo, dialedBy, interestedBy, followupLockedBy. Socket.IO used for real-time updates - broadcastAdminStats() pushes to admin-room. Rankings built from appState.agents + appState.allowedEids + appState.dialedLog.
relevant_files: server.js (lines 1117-1129: /api/admin/agents-list - iterates both agents and allowedEids)
server.js (lines 1515-1530: Socket.IO connection handler with socketAgentId tracking)
directory_structure: server.js (main backend), public/ (static frontend: admin/, agent/, tl/, forms/), data/ (empty - state stored externally), package.json
